title: Communauté de communes du Haut Clocher
summary: The Communauté de communes du Haut Clocher  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ponthieu-Marquenterre in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Haut Clocher  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ponthieu-Marquenterre in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 20 communes:
